name: Lentil Bolognese with Wholewheat Pasta
description: Lentil ragu over wholewheat penne. Fixture exercising all macro fields populated.

steps.title: Soften the soffritto
steps.content: Heat {0001} in a heavy pan. Add {0002}, {0003} and {0004}. Cook for 10 minutes until softened.

steps.title: Add garlic and lentils

steps.title: Build and simmer
steps.content: Add {0007}, {0008} and {0009}. Simmer for 30 minutes until the lentils are tender and the sauce has thickened.

steps.title: Cook the pasta
steps.content: Cook {0010} in well-salted boiling water until al dente. Drain and toss through the ragu.
